key_insight: HotRelax predicts relaxed crystal structures in a single forward pass, eliminating iterative optimization and the need for DFT force labels.
engineering_relevance: This can substantially speed up high-throughput materials screening and make structure relaxation more practical for discovery workflows.
method: Trained on paired unrelaxed/relaxed structures directly.
One-shot end-to-end relaxation with no post-processing.
evidence_signal: The model was evaluated on five datasets across 3D bulk crystals, 2D layered materials, and catalysts, showing lower errors on several benchmarks and energetically close predictions to DFT-relaxed structures.
watch_item: Performance may depend on the availability and coverage of paired relaxed-structure training data, so generalization to new chemistries should be validated carefully.
paper_title: High-order tensor neural network for iteration-free structure relaxation
